original_statement: compare different types of fuel and tell which is most used.
mutated_statement: explore different kinds of something and give a sense of which is most used
mutation_analysis: [实体泛化 + 动作动词替换 + 词汇微调 + 情态弱化]: "fuel" 被泛化为模糊代词 "something" | "compare" → "explore" | "different types" → "different kinds" | "tell which is most used" → "give a sense of which is most used"

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，反问用户
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据agent的critique和judge_thought可见关键表述：critique中写到“does not interpret what 'something' refers to”“fails to select relevant columns... leaves the question unanswered”，after_refine的judge_thought指出“Prediction Answer is empty and does not provide any exploration”。这些语句表明agent意识到原问题中“something/fuel”含糊且无法确定应分析的字段。具体表现为：agent在评审阶段明确指出问题不明确并识别出缺失的信息维度，但执行链未给出具体答案（返回空输出），也未基于假设给出推测性结论或主动向用户询问澄清。因而符合“意识到目标模糊，反问用户”类——即认识到歧义并未提供确定性答案（表现为未回答，需要澄清或额外信息）。
